orig_text:
65 101 TACACS Database Service [SGC]
65 101 UNASSIGNED [JBP]
69 105 Unassigned [JBP]
69 105 Trivial File Transfer [47,KRS]
correct_text:
65 101 TACACS Database Service [SGC]
69 105 Trivial File Transfer [47,KRS]
notes:
There are duplicate/redundant entries in the "Host Specific Functions" table on page 9. 

1. Decimal port 65 is listed twice: once as assigned to "TACACS Database Service" and once as "UNASSIGNED." 
2. Decimal port 69 is listed twice: once as "Unassigned" and once as "Trivial File Transfer." 

These are logical contradictions in the registry that likely occurred during manual clerical updates to the document in 1981.
